name: example-tool
description: Reference tool plugin demonstrating pkg/toolplugin. Exposes example_echo, example_now, example_add.

tools.name: example_echo
tools.description: Echo back the arguments map verbatim. Smoke-tests the wiring.

tools.name: example_now
tools.description: Return the plugin's current UTC time as RFC3339.

tools.name: example_add
tools.description: Sum two numbers. Args: {"a": number, "b": number}. Errors on missing/non-numeric input.
